description: Governance proxy for MCP servers — policy evaluation, human approval, audit trails.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.VladUZH/sidclaw-governance-mcp

environmentVariables.description: SidClaw API key for policy evaluation and audit logging
environmentVariables.name: SIDCLAW_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Agent identity for policy matching and audit trails
environmentVariables.name: SIDCLAW_AGENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Command for the upstream MCP server (e.g., npx)
environmentVariables.name: SIDCLAW_UPSTREAM_CMD

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated args for the upstream MCP server
environmentVariables.name: SIDCLAW_UPSTREAM_ARGS

environmentVariables.description: Approval mode: error (default, returns immediately) or block (waits for approval)
environmentVariables.name: SIDCLAW_APPROVAL_MODE
